content.en:
The Devouring Beast had become Ye Tian's pet, so naturally he didn't dare to hide it from Ye Tian, so he hurriedly spoke: "Master, our Devouring Beast has a inheritance memory, and I have obtained the inheritance memory of the Devouring Beast clan, including many magical powers and secret techniques, etc., but now that I can obtain such strength, it is also related to a great opportunity in the Stygian Flower Realm, and that place is the Death Flower Sea of the Stygian Flower Realm!"

"Death Flowers?"

Ye Tian hadn't heard of this place, so he asked, "Is there anything special about this place?"

Devouring Beast said: "Master, the Sea of Death Flowers is a kind of ocean formed by the Flower of Death, the Flower of Death is also a kind of plant life, and they also have the power to devour, once they enter the Sea of Death Flower, they will be devoured by the Flower of Death." Because I have devouring powers, although I am not afraid of the sea of death, I only dare to wander on the periphery of the sea of death flowers. Many years ago, I entered the sea of death flowers, and was shocked to find that some death flowers can condense an incomparably precious flower liquid. This kind of flower liquid has the effect of refining the divine soul, and the reason why my divine soul can be upgraded to the great god level is because of the auxiliary effect of that flower liquid. In addition, the flower liquid can also increase perception. "

"What, it can refine the divine soul, and it can also increase understanding!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

This kind of treasure is extremely rare in the outside world, and it is even more precious if it is a treasure that has an effect on the true god level.

Ye Tian is only at the god level now, and there is no doubt that that kind of flower liquid will definitely help him.

From ancient times to the present, only god-level people can enter here, and the Death Flower Sea is so dangerous, it is absolutely impossible for Danta to let people enter the Death Flower Sea, which is an act of looking for death.

Therefore, Ye Tian dared to conclude that Danta did not know the secret of the Death Flower Sea.

This time, if he hadn't subdued the Devouring Beast, Ye Tian would definitely not have been able to know the secret of the Death Flower Sea.

The universe is incomparably large, and it is often possible to give birth to incomparably precious treasures in a small place, and this is the case with the Death Flower Sea in the Stygian Flower Realm.

"Chance, it's definitely a big chance!"

Ye Tian said a little excitedly.

"Let's go, take me!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

The Devourer answered.

Whew!!

Ye Tian hurried with the Devouring Beast to the Sea of Death Flowers.

Along the way, he occasionally encountered some red sandalwood, and Ye Tian was too lazy to pick them.

He didn't lack red sandalwood now, and what he really wanted was the flower liquid of the sea of death flowers, which was the treasure he wanted most now.

After about a few days of traveling, Ye Tian and the Devouring Beast finally came to an endless sea of death flowers.

"Master, this is the sea of death flowers!"

Devourer introduced.

Ye Tian stared at the flowers of death, these flowers of death had sharp serrated teeth, and they were constantly swaying, the mouth of the flower opened for a while, and closed for a while, as if they were breathing.

And Ye Tian noticed that there was some clear liquid substance in some flowers, and there was no doubt that it was flower sap.

"Plant life!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he used his copy talent to check the flower of death closest to him, and he really checked the talent.

Talent Identification
Species: Flower of Death
Bloodline Talent: Desolate

Strength Talents: Top

Speed Talent: Top

Defense Talents: Top

Devouring Talent: Mystery

Damage Transfer Talent: God-level

......

"Damage transfer talent, this talent is said to be only available to some special races, and it can transfer damage to other kinds, thus canceling the damage!" Ye Tian said darkly.

If it's just a single life, this talent is of little use.

But there are countless flowers of death here, which, once the damage is diverted, are enough to spread the fatal damage, and thus ignore the damage.

From the mouth of the Devouring Beast, Ye Tian also understood that if he wanted to deal with these Death Flowers, he had to uproot them and then swallow them before he could kill them, otherwise no matter how powerful the attack was, it would be difficult to kill a Flower of Death.

Because, killing a flower of death is equivalent to killing these countless flowers of death at the same time, this is not something that Ye Tian can do, I am afraid that only those cosmic gods can do it.

"The strength of a single Flower of Death is not strong, and I also have the talent to devour, the devouring ability of these Flower of Death can't help me, I can completely ignore these Flower of Death!"

Thinking of this, Ye Tian flew into the sea of death flowers, looking for the flower liquid.

At this time, a large number of Death Flowers released their devouring ability and tried to devour Ye Tian, but unfortunately their strength was too weak, so they couldn't help Ye Tian.

But so many flowers of death have been disturbing Ye Tian, and Ye Tian is also very annoying.

So, Ye Tian cast the Void Palm, and suddenly sucked a bunch of death flowers into the Void Realm.

In an instant, Ye Tian was in the Void Mina Realm, and instantly annihilated these Death Flowers, so that they didn't have time to connect with the Death Flowers in the outside world.

In this way, this batch of flowers of death really died.

As time passed, Ye Tian found a lot of flower liquid and easily took it.

One day!

Two days!

Three days!

In the blink of an eye, half a month has passed.

In this half a month, Ye Tian harvested a total of about eighty catties of flower liquid.

Since the Devouring Beast came here every once in a while to plunder the flower liquid, there was not much flower liquid on the periphery, and now there was only so much left.

"Devouring Beast, I'm going to the inside of the Sea of Death Flowers!"

Ye Tian said.

"Ah, master, the inside of the sea of death flowers is very dangerous, I don't dare to go in, if the master wants to go in, be careful!"

The Devourer reminded.

"It's okay, even if I'm in danger, if I want to escape, nothing can stop me!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

Swish!

Ye Tian kept teleporting, and it didn't take long for him to enter the interior of the Death Flower Sea.

The Flower of Death on the outer perimeter of the Flower of Death is the Yellow Flower of Death, while the Flower of Death on the inside is the Flower of Purple Death, and it is larger and more tenacious.

From the point of cultivation, these purple death flowers are all true god-level ninth-order, and they basically have god-level devouring talents, and their talents in other aspects are not weak at all.

Under the threat of so many purple death flowers, the Devouring Beast naturally did not dare to set foot in this area, otherwise the Devouring Beast might not be able to escape.

Fortunately, these Flowers of Death rely on soil and are difficult to move, otherwise the Flower of Death race is definitely the most terrifying race in the Stygian Flower Realm, enough to sweep through the Stygian Flower Realm.

Boom!!!

The purple flower of death unleashed its devouring ability, hoping to devour Ye Tian.

However, Ye Tian used his spatial talent to escape into the space, completely ignoring the devouring of this group of purple death flowers.

Of course, he wasn't afraid of these purple flowers of death, but he didn't want to fight with these purple flowers of death without a harvest, it didn't make any sense.

Ye Tian kept searching, and soon found that there was some purple flower sap in a purple death flower.

In an instant, Ye Tian made a move, and at an extremely fast speed, his right hand penetrated the space, snatching away the purple flower liquid in the purple death flower, and the purple death flower was extremely angry, but unfortunately he couldn't help Ye Tian at all.

That's it.

Ye Tian continued to use this method and snatched the purple sap of the purple death flowers one by one.

Although the wisdom of these purple death flowers is not high, they are also quick to counteract.

I saw that they completely closed the flower mouth, so that the purple flower juice did not leak out at all.

In this way, Ye Tian would not be able to easily find the purple flower liquid, nor would he be able to easily take the purple flower liquid.
